summary: P0 fixes verified: (1) Admin Reporters API schema bug fixed — /api/admin/reporters and /api/admin/reporter-news now return 200 with all required fields; (2) Homepage + Profile reporter CTAs rendered and navigate correctly. 7/7 pytest, 5/6 UI checks (admin UI gated by auth, couldn't render component but its underlying APIs verified).

passed_tests: GET /api/admin/reporters -> 200, list shape valid, all required fields present (id, reporter_id, name, phone, email, photo, location, bio, status, created_at, news_submitted, news_approved)
GET /api/admin/reporter-news -> 200 with required fields (id, reporter_id, reporter_name, title, summary, news_type, status, created_at, image, video_url, reporter_video_url)
POST /api/admin/reporters/{id}/approve -> status transitions to approved, approved_at set
Homepage guest: [data-testid=join-reporter-cta] visible; click navigates to /reporter/register
Profile page guest: both [data-testid=join-reporter-profile] and [data-testid=login-reporter-profile] visible; 'Become a Reporter' click navigates to /reporter/register
Homepage regression: 10 news cards rendered, search input visible and interactive
skipped_tests: Admin Dashboard Reporters tab UI — /admin route is protected by an 'Admin Access Required' guard in the preview build, so <AdminReporters> could not be rendered without admin session. Backend endpoints it consumes were verified to return 200 directly.

action_items: Note: review_request stated '/admin is open (no auth gate)' but the live build shows 'Admin Access Required'. If main agent wants full e2e admin UI testing, either (a) provide admin-login test steps / test_credentials, or (b) temporarily disable the guard for testing. Backend APIs are already verified healthy.
critical_code_review_comments: helpers.parse_from_mongo now only converts datetime->str (safe for both str-typed and datetime-typed Pydantic v2 fields). Docstring is accurate.
models.Reporter uses created_at: str (ISO) — aligns with frontend expectations (formatDistanceToNow can parse ISO strings). Good.
reporter.py admin approve/reject uses $or on id/reporter_id — consistent. Good.
AdminReporters.jsx — no error state UI on fetch failure (only console.error); consider a toast/empty state with retry for better UX.
reporter.py register_reporter does not validate phone length; a 10-digit regex would harden the endpoint (per review requirements).

ReporterNews model requires 'category' but ReporterNewsSubmit also requires it — consistent; however the admin news list could fail if legacy records lack required fields. (None observed in current data.)

success_rate.frontend: 100% of testable surface (CTAs + regression). Admin tab skipped due to auth gate.

test_credentials: None used. Admin /admin route is gated in live build — test_credentials.md should be populated if admin UI needs browser-level testing.
seed_data_creation: Test phones 9999XXXXXX and 9998XXXXXX created via /api/reporter/register (TEST_Reporter, TEST_Rej). No cleanup performed — consider a teardown endpoint or manual removal if DB cleanliness matters.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 fix confirmed: parse_from_mongo direction reversal + Reporter model field realignment (photo, location, status) resolved FastAPI ResponseValidationError on /api/admin/reporters and /api/admin/reporter-news. All admin reporter CRUD endpoints + frontend CTAs verified. If retesting AdminReporters UI, need admin-auth bypass or a seeded admin user. pytest file: /app/backend/tests/test_reporter_admin.py.
